name: Jesse Jackson Jr.
bio: Jesse Jackson Jr. is listed as a Democratic candidate in the 2026 IL-02 race. Local election coverage notes his return to electoral politics in this open-seat contest. (Source: Chicago Sun-Times voter guide, March 2026: https://chicago.suntimes.com/politics/elections/2026/voter-guide/candidates)

jacket.note: FEC candidate totals pending ETL import.

red_flags.label: Prior conviction
red_flags.detail: Candidate previously had a federal conviction; historical reporting is public record.
